title: Creating a hyperlink/ selectable button within the body of an automated email which updates a specific column on a board
excerpt: I currently have an email automation for project follow-up but I was wondering if there is a way to send a selectable button(s) within the body of the automated email which can instantly update a specific column on my bo…

posts.author: gabriel.castellanos (Gabriel Castellanos)
posts.cookedHtml: I currently have an email automation for project follow-up but I was wondering if there is a way to send a selectable button(s) within the body of the automated email which can instantly update a specific column on my board? Currently, the email response is received and the column is changed manually.

posts.author: Harsh (farioconsulting.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @gabriel.castellanos,
You could use something like Make or Zapier to tie this up all together, so that whenever a button is clicked on your email it would automatically update the columns on Monday

posts.author: Gergely80 (Gergely)
posts.cookedHtml: It is possible with easymails app (add-on)
